landing.compare_sub: How we compare to popular online mastering services (public info as of 2026).
landing.hero_sub: Upload a track — get a broadcast-ready master. LUFS normalization, studio EQ, 4-band compression and dithering. Great for AI music.
landing.how_title: Three steps to a finished master
landing.how_sub: Pro results with no engineering guesswork. The pipeline picks settings for your genre and target platform.
landing.step1_x: Drop WAV, MP3 or FLAC on the page. Free, no sign-up, files up to 100 MB.
landing.step2_x: Stream, EDM, Hip-Hop, Classical, Podcast, Lo-fi, House, Dry Vocal. LUFS, EQ and compression match the style.
landing.step3_x: Get WAV (or MP3/FLAC for subscribers) with normalized level, dithering and controlled peaks.
landing.pro_sub: Others offer reference mastering or streaming preview — not both. Magic Master does.
landing.pricing_sub: Start free — no card, no sign-up. Upgrade to Premium when you need more.
landing.testi_sub: Hundreds of tracks mastered — users share their results.
landing.cta_p: No sign-up. No card. Result in about 30 seconds.
landing.foot_desc: Pro audio mastering in your browser. Industry standards without a DAW subscription.
landing.foot_bottom2: Made with ♥ for musicians and producers
landing.foot_legal: All trademarks belong to their owners. Magic Master is not affiliated with the mentioned companies.
landing.alert_formats: Only WAV, MP3 and FLAC are supported.
pricing.faq_q1: Do I need an account for Free?
pricing.faq_a1: No. Drop a file and run mastering — no email, password or card. Free works without registration.
pricing.faq_q2: What are the free tier limits?
pricing.faq_a2: You can try mastering for free without sign-up; exact limits (per IP and time) are shown in the app and may change. Signed-in users see remaining masterings in the UI.
pricing.faq_q3: How do I pay for Pro or Studio?
pricing.faq_a3: Payments run via YooKassa: pick a plan here, sign in and pay. Your plan activates automatically after success.
pricing.faq_a4: Same DSP core. Free limits genre (Stream, −14 LUFS) and format (WAV). Studio EQ, M/S dynamics, maximizer and dithering are full quality.
pricing.faq_q5: Are my files stored on the server?
pricing.faq_a5: No. Files are processed in memory and removed after download (usually under 5 minutes). We don't keep your tracks on disk.
pricing.faq_a6: Yes! REST API is documented at /docs. Studio covers commercial automation and API keys; see the docs and the app for terms.
pricing.faq_q7: What are the unique PRO modules?
pricing.faq_a7: Six unique tools: Reference Track, Dynamic EQ (8 bands), Transient Designer, Spectral Denoiser, Parallel Compression and De-esser. Availability is in the comparison table and app.
pricing.faq_a8: Upload a reference track. We analyze its spectrum via FFT and build a corrective EQ curve so your master matches its tonal balance while keeping your mix's character.
pricing.faq_a9: After analysis, see how Spotify, YouTube, Apple Music, Tidal, Amazon and broadcast would normalize your track — green/yellow/red hints help you pick target LUFS before mastering.
landing.faq_q_reg: Do I need an account for free mastering?
landing.faq_a_reg: No. Free works without sign-up — upload and get a result. Exact limits are shown in the app.
landing.faq_a_fmt: Input: WAV, MP3, FLAC. Export: WAV 16-bit (Free); MP3 320 kbps and FLAC 24-bit (Pro/Studio). MP3 needs FFmpeg on the server.
landing.faq_q_lufs: What is LUFS and why normalize?
landing.faq_a_lufs: LUFS is the loudness standard for streaming. Spotify ~−14, Apple ~−16, clubs ~−9. Magic Master targets the level you choose.
landing.faq_q_store: Are my files stored on your servers?
landing.faq_a_store: No. Files are processed in memory and deleted after delivery. Free users' history stays in the browser (localStorage).
landing.faq_q_chain: Can I edit the processing chain?
landing.faq_a_chain: Yes on Pro and Studio: drag-and-drop module order, per-module amount, linear-phase EQ, reverb type and M/S settings.
landing.faq_q_api: Is there an API for my workflow?
landing.faq_a_api: Yes. Full docs at /docs. REST API runs mastering, analysis and metrics. Commercial use: Studio tier.
landing.compare_strip: Only Magic Master combines reference mastering, Dynamic EQ, Transient Designer and streaming preview in one free web app.
landing.ld_desc: Professional online audio mastering with LUFS normalization, studio EQ, multiband compression and dithering. Great for AI music and streaming.
landing.ld_offer_desc: Free tier: try mastering without sign-up; paid Pro and Studio plans with higher limits.

reset.meta_desc: Set a new password — Magic Master
landing.features_sub: A full mastering chain. Order and parameters are yours to tweak.
landing.spot_ref_body: Upload a reference — we build and apply a corrective EQ curve via FFT spectral analysis. Your track matches the tonal balance you love.
landing.spot_dyneq_body: EQ moves only when needed — per-band level following. Often 3–5× more transparent than multiband compression. Tames mud and resonances without killing character.
landing.spot_tr_body: Independent attack and sustain via dual envelope followers. Punch up drums or soften acoustic transients — not found in other web mastering services.
landing.spot_den_body: Frequency-domain Wiener filtering removes noise, hum and recording artifacts. Median-spectrum noise profile — stable on transients, preserves highs.
landing.spot_par_body: Blend heavily compressed signal with the dry path. Keeps transients, adds density — classic studio technique for musical weight without squashing.
landing.spot_prev_body: See how Spotify, YouTube, Apple Music, Tidal and broadcast would normalize your track — green/yellow/red hints.
landing.feat_lufs_x: Spotify −14, Apple −16, club −9, broadcast −24. True Peak ≤ −1 dBTP.
landing.feat_eq_x: Industry studio curve. HP 40 Hz, LP 18 kHz. Linear or minimum phase.
landing.feat_comp_x: Multiband dynamics with soft knee and upward compression. Adjustable crossovers.
landing.feat_vec_x: Lissajous L vs R up to 6000 points. Stereo width and phase at a glance.
landing.feat_exc_x: Tape/tube/warm/transistor/digital modes. 1×/2×/4× oversampling. Saturation without clipping.
landing.feat_img_x: 4-band M/S imager. Stereoize delay. Live L/R correlation.
landing.feat_reft_x: FFT spectral match to a reference → corrective EQ. Sounds like your favorite record.
landing.feat_dyneq_x: Eight bands follow level. Clearer than multiband comp. Tames mud and resonance.
landing.feat_tr_x: Independent attack and sustain. Add punch or soften transients — rare in competitors.
landing.feat_den_x: Wiener denoising in the frequency domain — noise and hum without losing detail or air.
landing.feat_par_x: NY-style blend of crushed and dry. Weight and vibe without squash — studio standard.
landing.feat_rev_x: Five types: plate, room, hall, theater, cathedral. Separate M/S wet/dry.
landing.feat_dith_x: Dither for 16-bit export: TPDF, ns_e, ns_itu. Auto-blank.
landing.feat_chain_x: Drag-and-drop order, per-module amount, JSON API configuration.
landing.feat_lufsgraph_x: 400 ms loudness blocks. Spot trouble areas before mastering.
landing.feat_api_x: Full REST API with Swagger. Wire into your DAW, scripts, CI/CD.
landing.testi1_text: “Dropped an EDM draft — club-ready master in ~30 seconds. Level, dynamics and top end sat right.”
landing.testi2_text: “Perfect for podcasts — −16 LUFS for Apple Podcasts, cleaned-up low-end noise. I master every episode here now.”
landing.testi3_text: “Loved the chain editor — reordered exciter and imager, tweaked amounts. Beats a couple of pricey VSTs.”
landing.faq_q_lufs_long: What is LUFS and why normalize?
landing.faq_a_lufs_long: LUFS is the streaming loudness standard. Spotify ~−14, Apple ~−16, clubs ~−9. Magic Master targets the level you pick.
landing.faq_q_chain_long: Can I edit the processing chain?
landing.faq_a_chain_long: Yes on Pro and Studio: drag-and-drop module order, per-module amount, linear-phase EQ, reverb type and M/S settings.
